arts.ttl: Alonso has no plans to rest players ahead of Bayern clash
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen coach Xabi Alonso says he has no plans to rotate his squad heavily against Eintracht Frankfurt with the midweek Champions League clash against Bayern Munich in mind.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'hold talks' over free transfer for Bayern Munich star as £18.2m 'hesitation' revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly hold talks over a free transfer for Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich following an impasse in contract talks with the German giants.

arts.ttl: “I was in my boxers!”: Neymar recalls nearly joining Bayern Munich
arts.sum: But in a recent interview, Neymar revealed that he nearly ended up at Bayern Munich, playing under Pep Guardiola. Guardiola, who had recently left Barcelona, wanted Neymar to join him at his next club, but Neymar was less-than-prepared for the offer.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Want to Sign Another ‘World-Class’ Tottenham Star After Kane
arts.sum: According to reports, Bayern Munich could be tempted into making a move for this Tottenham sensation.

arts.ttl: Arsenal reportedly in talks to sign Kimmich
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly looking into the possibility of signing Joshua Kimmich on a free transfer.

arts.ttl: VfB Stuttgart vs Bayern Munich Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch

arts.ttl: Arsenal hold talks with Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich over a free transfer in the summer
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports Arsenal are one of the clubs to hold talks with Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich over a potential free transfer in the summer. Earlier this week, it was revealed…

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — February 28th: What will the final score of Bayern Munich vs. VfB Stuttgart be?
arts.sum: Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich’s Champions League draw of Bayer Leverkusen? Several key players have been dealing with injuries or illnesses in recent weeks and the specter of a monumental Champions League tie with Bayer Leverkusen also looms over the squad as well.

arts.ttl: Wanted by Liverpool and Man City - why Joshua Kimmich could leave Bayern Munich this summer
arts.sum: Bayern Munich spun the rumour mill into action this week when reports from Germany stated that the Bundesliga giants had withdrawn their offer of a new contract renewal for star midfielder Joshua...

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'have concrete interest in Bayern Munich superstar and have held talks', after German champions WITHDREW their new contract offer
arts.sum: Arsenal are discussing the possibility of signing Bayern Munich's Joshua Kimmich on a free transfer in the summer, according to reports.
